Tidy rankingQ estimator outputs

Source: R/output_methods.R
tidy.rankingQ_output.Rd

Tidy rankingQ estimator outputs

Usage

# S3 method for class 'rankingQ_output'
tidy(
  x,
  component = c("estimates", "p_random"),
  method = NULL,
  type = NULL,
  item = NULL,
  conf.int = TRUE,
  ...
)

Arguments

x

A rankingQ estimator output object.

component

Which part of the object to tidy. Defaults to "estimates".

method

Which estimator to return. Supported values are "raw", "direct", and "ipw" when available for the object.

type

Estimate type filter. Supported values are "average_rank", "pairwise", "top_k", and "marginal".

item

Optional item filter.

conf.int

If FALSE, confidence-interval columns are omitted from the returned tibble.

...

Unused.

Value

A tibble with a standardized layout for ranking estimates.
